verses.first: Jay Adhya Shakti, Ma Jay Adhya Shakti
verses.second: Akhand Brahmand Deepavya, Pag Lagya Patal

verses.first: E Mahisasur Ne Maryo, Mahisasur Maryo Ne
verses.second: Rudhire Kidhi Ramjol, E Chand Mund Ne Sanharya

verses.first: Shumbh Nishumbh Sanharya, Raktabij Ne Rolyo
verses.second: E Brahma Vishnu Sadashiv, Pragatya E Pranavakarmaan

verses.first: Trane E Dev Janya Ne, Ma Trane E Dev Janya
verses.second: E Koti Tej Pragatya, Manun Roop Na Jay

verses.first: Chandra Surya E Trilochan, Ma Chandra Surya E Trilochan
verses.second: Adbhut Aa Avtar, E Brahmand Ne Dharya

verses.first: Sarva Jagat Ne Tarya, Ma Sarva Jagat Ne Tarya
verses.second: E Matajini Aarti Je Koi Gashe

verses.first: E Bhane Vasant Ullasthi, Ma Bhane Vasant Ullasthi
verses.second: E Bhakti Shakti Ne Mukti, Bhavsagar Tarshe

verses.first: Jay Adhya Shakti, Ma Jay Adhya Shakti
verses.second: Akhand Brahmand Deepavya, Pag Lagya Patal
